title: lycopodium reflexum var. rigidum
intro: Lycopodium reflexum var. rigidum, also known as Stiff Club Moss or Stiff Ground Pine, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium reflexum var. rigidum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
